model.label: Force 回调 + EMA 穿透触发
model.description: 当前代码中的模型：日线用 2 日 Force Index 识别顺周线方向的回调/反弹，盘中以日线 EMA 穿透价优先、前一日突破价备选。
model.weekly_model: MACD slope with impulse-system direction gate
model.intraday_trigger: Daily EMA penetration entry first, previous-day break as alternate trigger
model.exit_model: SafeZone/Nick initial stop; weekly value-zone target when available; daily ATR 1x trailing stop

model.label: 价值带转向 + 小时突破触发
model.description: 45c9b2d 之前一直使用的模型：日线看回到 13EMA 价值带、Histogram 转向和结构完整，盘中用上一根小时 K 高低点 trailing stop 触发。
model.weekly_model: MACD histogram delta with EMA13 alignment
model.intraday_trigger: Trailing buy-stop/sell-stop from the previous closed hourly bar
model.exit_model: SafeZone/Nick initial stop; thermometer target; daily ATR 1x trailing stop

model.label: Force 回调 + EMA 穿透触发
model.description: 当前代码中的模型：日线用 2 日 Force Index 识别顺周线方向的回调/反弹，盘中以日线 EMA 穿透价优先、前一日突破价备选。
model.weekly_model: MACD slope with impulse-system direction gate
model.intraday_trigger: Daily EMA penetration entry first, previous-day break as alternate trigger
model.exit_model: SafeZone/Nick initial stop; weekly value-zone target when available; daily ATR 1x trailing stop

assumptions.data_source: sqlite-only price_bars cache; symbols with partial history participate only where data exists
assumptions.position_sizing: whole shares only; each entry is constrained by remaining stop budget, per-trade 2% risk logic, and available buying power; max_open_positions=0 means no position-count cap
assumptions.entry_model: Daily EMA penetration entry first, previous-day break as alternate trigger
assumptions.exit_model: SafeZone/Nick initial stop; weekly value-zone target when available; daily ATR 1x trailing stop
assumptions.same_bar_rule: conservative; if trigger and stop both fit inside the same hour bar, exit at stop on that bar
